hero.title: AI Agent Operating System · Distributed Intelligent Execution Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: Elevating AI from a "conversation tool" to a schedulable, executable, collaborative system-level runtime entity. Powered by Hermes Agent as the execution kernel for unified intelligent operations across devices, systems, and networks.

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.subtitle: AIOS is not an AI chat product — it's an intelligent execution infrastructure that lets AI run like an operating system.

items.title: Core Definition
items.desc: AIOS (AI Agent Operating System) is an intelligent OS-level platform designed for the next generation of AI computing paradigms.

items.title: Core Objective
items.desc: Elevate AI from a "conversation tool" to a schedulable, executable, collaborative system-level runtime entity.

items.title: Core Mechanism
items.desc: Hermes Agent serves as the execution kernel, enabling unified intelligent operations across devices, systems, and networks.

items.title: Core Paradigm
items.desc: Multi-Agent cluster collaboration model, building an AI-native operating system ecosystem.

problems.title: Background & Problem Statement
problems.subtitle: Four structural deficiencies in current AI systems

items.title: AI Stuck at the Conversation Layer
items.desc: Can only generate content, cannot execute tasks. Lacks system-level operational capability.

items.title: Severe Device & System Fragmentation
items.desc: Windows / Linux / Mobile / IoT operate independently with no unified scheduling layer.

items.title: Agents Cannot Collaborate
items.desc: Most AI Agents are monolithic structures with no distributed collaboration capability.

items.title: Lack of Unified Execution Standards
items.desc: APIs, tools, and protocols are severely fragmented with no unified Execution Layer.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Four-layer core structure, from kernel to control plane

kernel.name: AIOS Kernel
kernel.label: System Kernel Layer
kernel.items: Agent Lifecycle · Task Scheduler · Resource Management · State Sync · Security & Access Control

runtime.name: Hermes Agent Runtime
runtime.label: Execution Layer
runtime.items: Cross-Platform Runtime · Bidirectional Protocol · Local Device Control · API/Protocol Adapter

cluster.name: Agent Cluster Layer
cluster.label: Cluster Layer
cluster.items: Agent Swarm · Distributed Task Split · Dynamic Load Balancing · Auto Failover

control.name: AIOS Control Plane
control.label: Control Plane
control.items: Web Console · Workflow Builder · Device Management · Logs & Audit

items.title: Hermes Agent Communication Protocol
items.desc: WebSocket / MQTT / HTTP / LAN Direct Connect — low latency, high reliability, auto-reconnect, multi-node broadcast

items.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
items.desc: Agent Swarm intelligence: Task → Subtasks → Multi-Agent → Aggregation. Round-robin, weighted, capability-based, and dynamic scheduling

items.title: Execution Engine
items.desc: AI-driven real-world execution: cross-system automation, device control, workflow orchestration, API composition, local scripts

items.title: Security & Permission System
items.desc: Agent permission tiers · Execution approval flow · Audit logs · Instruction signing · Whitelist device control

items.title: Distributed Task Scheduling
items.desc: Tasks split into subtask clusters, auto-assigned to optimal Agent nodes, results aggregated and returned uniformly

items.title: Human-in-the-Loop
items.desc: Human-in-the-loop mechanism — critical operations require manual confirmation, balancing automation efficiency with safety

scenarios.title: Application Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: From hotel automation to AI cluster computing

items.title: Hotel Automation
items.desc: Unified control of AC, lighting, door locks, curtains — one command for full-room scene switching

items.title: AI-Powered Office
items.desc: Automated cross-system tasks: email processing, data organization, report generation, schedule management

items.title: IT Operations
items.desc: Server cluster management, anomaly alert response, automatic fault recovery, log analysis

items.title: Smart Home IoT
items.desc: Multi-protocol device control: WiFi / BLE / Zigbee / RS485, cross-brand interconnection

items.title: AI Cluster Computing
items.desc: Multi-Agent collaborative task execution, distributed inference, large-scale parallel processing

items.title: Enterprise Workflows
items.desc: Approval automation, cross-department data flows, intelligent decision support, compliance audit tracking

vision.subtitle: Building an AI-native operating system ecosystem

vision.statement: AIOS is an intelligent execution infrastructure that lets AI run like an operating system.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Core questions about the AIOS whitepaper

items.q: How is AIOS different from ChatGPT / Claude?
items.a: ChatGPT / Claude are "conversation tools" that can only generate content. AIOS is an "OS-level platform" that enables AI to truly execute tasks — control devices, call APIs, orchestrate workflows, and collaborate across multiple Agents. The core difference: from "generation" to "execution".

Hermes Agent is the execution kernel of AIOS, analogous to a "process" in an operating system. It runs cross-platform (Windows / Linux / macOS / Mobile / Server), supports bidirectional communication, local device control, and API protocol adaptation — the bridge between AI and the real world.

A task can be decomposed into subtask clusters, distributed to multiple Agent nodes for parallel execution. Supports round-robin, weighted, capability-based, and dynamic load scheduling strategies — like a distributed computing cluster, but AI-driven.

AIOS enforces a mandatory security model: Agent permission tiers, execution approval flow (Human-in-the-loop), operation audit logs, instruction signature verification, and whitelist device control. Critical operations require human confirmation.

From hotel automation (AC/lighting/door lock control) to IT ops (server cluster management), from smart home IoT (multi-protocol device interconnection) to enterprise workflows (approval/data/compliance). The core: any scenario requiring AI-driven real-world execution.

items.q: How can I join the AIOS ecosystem?
items.a: AIOS is building an open ecosystem: developers can contribute Agent capabilities and MCP tools, enterprises can integrate private deployments, hardware vendors can embed Agent Nodes. Contact us to learn about partnership opportunities.

cta.title: Join the AIOS Ecosystem
cta.subtitle: AIOS is redefining how AI operates. From conversation to execution. From tools to operating system.
cta.note: Open Source · Built by the Community
